title: My First Words — Everyday Objects
tagline: The words your toddler meets every single day.
description: Chunky, baby-safe cards for the very first vocabulary: cup, shoe, dog, spoon. Real-photo style illustrations on the front, a simple point-and-say prompt on the back.
benefits: Baby-safe rounded corners and extra-thick board
Builds first vocabulary through familiar objects
Point-and-say prompts make parents natural teachers
